---
title: "Writing"
listing:
  - id: personal
    contents: posts/personal
    type: default
    sort: "date desc"
    sort-ui: [date, title]
    fields: [date, title, description]
    feed: true
  - id: bobbology
    contents: posts/bobbology
    type: default
    # Curated order: Canon (1) -> Lesson/Lecture 1 (2) -> Lecture 2 (3) -> ...
    # Toggle to date/title still works via sort-ui.
    sort: "order asc"
    sort-ui: [date, title]
    fields: [date, title, description]
    feed: true
  - id: notes
    contents: posts/notes
    type: default
    sort: "date desc"
    sort-ui: [date, title]
    fields: [date, title, description]
    feed: true
---

## Personal

::: {#personal}
:::

## Bobbology

::: {#bobbology}
:::

## Notes & Misc

::: {#notes}
:::
